installCommand: FRONTEND_DIR=""; for d in . "Novaryn Hub" "../Novaryn Hub" "../../Novaryn Hub"; do if [ -f "$d/vite.config.ts" ] && [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then FRONTEND_DIR="$d"; break; fi; done; [ -n "$FRONTEND_DIR" ] || { echo "Unable to locate frontend directory"; pwd; find . -maxdepth 3 -type d; exit 1; }; cd "$FRONTEND_DIR" && bun install
buildCommand: FRONTEND_DIR=""; for d in . "Novaryn Hub" "../Novaryn Hub" "../../Novaryn Hub"; do if [ -f "$d/vite.config.ts" ] && [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then FRONTEND_DIR="$d"; break; fi; done; [ -n "$FRONTEND_DIR" ] || { echo "Unable to locate frontend directory"; pwd; find . -maxdepth 3 -type d; exit 1; }; ROOT_DIR="$(pwd)"; cd "$FRONTEND_DIR" && bun run build && cd "$ROOT_DIR" && rm -rf dist && cp -R "$FRONTEND_DIR/dist" dist
